query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as normal_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_total,
  SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as grand_total,
  SUM(CAST(bad_debt_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as bad_debt_amount_col
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';
